zh: 列出我手机上安装的所有应用。
en: List all the apps installed on my phone.

zh: 给我看看这台设备上安装的应用程序。
en: Show me the applications installed on this device.
What apps do I have installed?

zh: 你能显示所有已安装的应用吗？
en: Can you display all installed applications?

zh: 把我现在手机上安装的所有应用都列出来。
en: List all the apps installed on my phone right now.

zh: 给我看看这台设备现在安装了哪些应用。
en: Show me the applications installed on this device right now.
What apps do I have installed right now.

zh: 现在列出已安装的应用程序。
en: Please list the installed apps right now.

zh: 你现在能显示所有已安装的应用程序吗？
en: Can you display all installed applications right now.
